Text.Page:
One of Skulregnath's soul fragments survived and regenerated the dread dragon. We have to stop it once again.

Penetrate Sigil Adstringo and destroy {@LinkCreature:480#107#Evignar}, {@LinkCreature:480#113#Harkyriss}, {@LinkCreature:480#119#Great Chief Tungkan}, and {@LinkCreature:480#121#Skulregnath}.

Those dragon fragments require examination. Maybe they will reveal a way to keep this worm dead.

Superb work, ! How many people can say they've killed an immortal dragon once, let alone twice?

Maybe we can figure out a way to keep this from becoming a daily occurrence, eh?
It looks like you haven't completed your mission yet.
